app.name: The Cube
app.maintenanceMessage: The Cube is temporarily under maintenance. Please try again later.
app.blockedMessage: This version of The Cube is no longer supported. Please install the official version.

update.title: The Cube 2.0.69 is ready
update.message: Install the latest version for offline clone detection, fixed details metadata, and improved notifications.
releaseNotes: Fixed detail navigation so the selected movie or series opens with the correct TMDB id and metadata
Notifications now have a packaged fallback config when gateway config is unavailable
Added inbox and spam folder guidance during account registration
Cascade no longer appears inside the native ExoPlayer server list
Cascade is disabled by remote config and permanently disabled on TV
Added Probe remaining servers to the server menu
Sports and Anime tabs are disabled unless remote config explicitly enables them
Official builds verify package and signing certificate locally, even offline
Home banner and poster cards have been polished
Release builds run R8 minification and resource shrinking

items.title: WE ARE BACK
items.message: Development and fixes are actively ongoing. We're continuing to improve playback, streaming stability, performance, and the issues you've reported. You can still enjoy THE CUBE while we work - updates and improvements will continue rolling out regularly. Thank you for your patience and support.

items.title: Support The Cube
items.message: Support is optional and helps development. Third-party servers may still go down or return errors.
